publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday October 11, 2018 at 03:37

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, writings, printed material, photographs, personal papers, audio tapes, electronic files, and other papers by, or relating to Mei-Mei Berssenbrugge.

did.unittitle: The Acadia Summer Art Program (ASAP)(Kippy Stroud)
The American Awards for Literature and Performance (Douglas Messerli)
Amelan, Bjorn (Bill T. Jones / Arne Zane Dance Co.)
Anaya, Rudolfo and Patricia (Blue Mesa Review)
Birmingham Area Consortium of Higher Education(BACHE) Visiting Writers Series
Center for Contemporary Arts of Santa Fe
The CoEvolution Quarterly—The Journal for the Protection of All Beings (David Meltzer)
Fisher, Dexter (The Third Woman and Modern Language Association)
Gill, John and Elaine (The Crossing Press)
Gund, Agnes and David Shapiro (MMB to)
Kherdian, David (also MacMillan related Settling America)
New Mexico Poetry-in-the-Schools and Artists-in-the-Schools Programs
New York State Poets in the Schools
The Open Boat (edited by Garrett Hongo)
The Poetry Project at St. Marks Church (2 folders)
Puerto del Sol (New Mexico State University)
University of Texas at El Paso
Assorted to MMB from unknown senders
House #2 In China + #3 or Chinese Space
Drafts worked on with Brad Morrow, 12/83
Correspondence with Universal Limited Art Editions
Photos of Kiki Smith and MMB visiting the Carnegie Museum,
Working draft w/ first drafts Aug.–Sept.–Oct 1995
Extra working drafts of individual pages to discard
Close / Distance Poem [inc. Pack Rat Sieve First Drafts], ca. 1978?
Drafts sent to Paul Zweig and Fran mcCullough 1982-without Farolita
I Love Artists: New and Selected Poems
Copy of original ms to comp, 9/20/05
Life into Literature (I Love Artists), file #1
Life into Literature (I Love Artists), file #2
Situation and Image (Susie, Kiki, Annie)–first draft and notes, 1996.
Alterity (Dressing Up Our Pets)-First draft and notes, 1997
The Retired Architect-First Draft and Notes, 1997
Migrant (The Lost Ring)—first draft and notes, 1999
Notes—new poems folder started 11/99 + complete notes
Working drafts Nest-to be re-collected into poem files
What My Mother Told Me or Quotations from Chairman Mao
Last minute revisions, March or April 1977
Fascinating First Drafts and Failed Poems, Summer 69-Before Nepal"
Nepal Travel Journal-Alaskan Poems in Back, 1970-1971
[Here is the breakup of grasses across the meteor…]
American Women Poets in the 21st Century
Charles Bernstein interview w/ MMB for Conjunction, 2000
Two Conversations with Mei-mei Berssenbrugge (with Laura Hinton)
The Axiomatic Drama of Classical Physics
Bowes, Ed — Against the Slope of Social Speech
The Straw That I Suck Life Through
Davis, Andrew — Craft and Mandelstam in Limbo
Foss, Phillip — The Composition of Glass
The Collected Poems of Barbara Guest
The Collected Poems of Barabar Guest - Assorted
[Approx. 45 drafts of assorted Guest poems some with MMB remarks by hand.] Some multiple drafts of same title.
Certain Hazards of Living without the Assumption of Timing
Mac Low, Jackson and Anne Tardos
McMurtry, Larry — A Night at the White House
Midgette, Willard — Black Book and Red Book
The Recovery of the Public World
The Architect of Silence and Diffraction Grating
Spring Silk: Translations from the Chinese / The Silk Dragon: Translations of Chinese Poetry
Saints and Singing and Description and Landscape
Waldman, Anne — Dark Arcana / Afterimage or Glow
White, Hazel — Peril as Architectural Enrichment
Williams, William S. — Preliminary notes for an unrealized Whitney collaboration with Richard Tuttle
Yoshihara, Sachiko — A Selection of Poems by Sachiko Yoshihara Turned into Songs
Portrait of and Artist as a Young Ball
Zurawski, Magdalena — A Congressman Named Weiner Resigned Today
Wollheim - Painting is an Art - Princeton 1987
Reviews, clippings and articles about MMB
University of Alaska, Juneau - Poems Written During Writing Workshop with MMB
Poems I used so many times for teaching in Poets in the Schools I found them to be Basic poems

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Box 54 (audiovisual material): Restricted fragile material. Reference copies may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

did.unittitle: National Poetry Festival GVSC Mei-Mei Berssenbrugge - Reading
Berssenbrugge, Mei-Mei, Leslie Marmon Silko, Frank Chin, Gary Soto, and others - Readings

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Box 55 (digital media): Restricted fragile material. Reference copies may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

did.unittitle: Notely, Alice and Mei-Mei Bersenbrugge 2010 Tuscon Festival of Books
